try has come to embrace industrial technology, modern finance and
                                                                                                                    international credit. The first generation of revolutionaries led by
                                                                                                                    Comrade Mao Zedong brought the Chinese people together to form
                                                                                                                    the People’s Republic of China after overthrowing imperialism, feu-
                                                                                                                    dalism and bureaucrat-capitalism, which weighed like three big
                                                                                                                    mountains on the backs of people before liberation. This event is
                                                                                                                    unquestionably a milestone in China’s modernization course. Thereupon, Chinese people become their own masters and have real
                                                                                                                    control of their own destiny. Under the guidance of the second gen-
                                                                                                                    eration of central collective leadership with Deng Xiaoping as the
                                                                                                                    core and the subsequent central leaderships with Jiang Zemin and
                                                                                                                    Hu Jintao successively as General Secretary of the CPC Central
                                                                                                                    Committee, China’s unprecedented reform and opening up have
                                                                                                                    brought about remarkable economic and social achievements across
                                                                                                                    the country. Since then, China has embarked on the new era of
                                                                                                                    accelerating socialist modernization and advancing into a moder-
                                                                                                                    ately prosperous society in an all-round way.
